title: Same data, same SQL, return different results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id Int32, company String, department String, salary Decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(1, 'COM A', 'DEP A', 50000.00);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(2, 'COM B', 'DEP A', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(3, NULL, 'DEP A', 60000.00);
SELECT department, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS ids FROM test_table GROUP BY department ORDER BY ids DESC;
key_bug_features: Different results based on insert order in SQL
